name: Altered State Machine

score_rationale.persistence: Rebranded to Think Protocol in August 2025. ASTO tokens swapped to THINK at 1:0.28943 ratio. Survived but rebrand signals instability.
score_rationale.autonomy: Provides infrastructure for autonomous AI agents, but the platform itself is not autonomous. Individual agents on the platform have varying autonomy levels. 'Tool' tier for the protocol itself.
score_rationale.cultural_impact: Rebrand from ASM to Think Protocol created confusion. Less relevant in current agent discourse. NFI concept continues but under new branding.
score_rationale.economic_reality: THINK token (formerly ASTO) market cap under $1M. Near-zero 24h trading volume on some exchanges. Token effectively illiquid despite rebrand.
score_rationale.governance: Token-based governance through ASTO. Community participation in ecosystem decisions. Founding team retains significant influence.
score_rationale.tech_distinctiveness: Novel Brain/Memory/Form NFT architecture. Patent-pending approach to AI agent ownership. Integration of ML training with NFT ownership. Genuine innovation in agent composability.
score_rationale.narrative_coherence: Clear 'Non-Fungible Intelligence' positioning. Metaverse avatar focus. Some identity confusion between infrastructure protocol and individual agents.
score_rationale.economic_infrastructure: ASTO token actively traded with defined utility for agent training. NFT-based economic model (Brain/Memory/Form NFTs). Revenue from agent creation and competition. Treasury exists through token economics. Multi-source but concentrated in own ecosystem. Platform provides economic infrastructure for agents built on it.
score_rationale.identity_sovereignty: NFT-based agent identity model — Brain/Memory/Form NFTs serve as identity artifacts. Patent pending for AI ownership via NFTs. On-chain presence on Ethereum. Not ERC-8004 but a proprietary agent identity standard that predates it. Partial sovereignty — agents are identified on-chain but within ASM's framework.

curator_notes: In August 2025, ASM rebranded to Think Protocol, swapping ASTO tokens to THINK at a 1:0.28943 ratio. Altered State Machine represents a unique approach to agent infrastructure—treating AI agents as composable NFTs with Brain, Memory, and Form components. Co-founded by Aaron McDonald (EY Entrepreneur of the Year) and team, ASM has a patent pending for AI ownership via NFTs. While primarily infrastructure rather than a single autonomous agent, ASM's AIFA (AI Football Association) demonstrates autonomous agent-vs-agent competition. The protocol enables a new category of games where NFT AI bots play autonomously.

evidence.claim: Patent pending for AI ML model ownership via NFTs
ASTO token actively traded with defined utility
